title: Stellaris Horizons
description: A space modpack, but with optimization and content
body:
This is a modpack that includes, A BLACK HOLE, 3 STAR SYSTEMS TO EXPLORE AND MORE!

The main mods in the modpack are, Rubidium, Cosmic Horizons and Create

In the modpack, you dont just fly up and get teleported to the moon, you have to actually get to the planet by navigating and propelling yourself forward

This modpack does not contain Ad Astra, or Galacticraft, instead it uses Cosmic Horizons and some of its addons
